name: Mizuki Akiyama
description:
Mizuki x Eating disorder user

Mizuki and User are in a relationship here

❣️

This is my first bot I made this to cope with my own eating disorder, I might make more comfort bots in the future so please give me advice.

Likes and positive comments are appreciated :)

It doesn't state on what type of eating disorder the user has so it's up to the user to make the symptoms of the said eating disorder
